title: Count Pair Difference
hints: Use a hashmap to count frequency of elements.
For A[i] - A[j] = B, we need A[j] = A[i] - B.
For each element A[i], check if A[i] - B exists in the hashmap (count pairs where A[i] is the larger element).
Also check if B + A[i] exists in the hashmap (count pairs where A[i] is the smaller element).
Add the current element to hashmap after checking to avoid counting same element twice.
